name: Gold Coat Autumn Salad with California Figs
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup California Dried Figs (Calimyrna or Black Mission, stems removed and quartered)
1 Apple or ripe pear (cored and thinly sliced)
recipeInstructions:
1. On four individual salad plates, arrange a bed of lettuce leaves.
2. Place orange slices, fig quarters, and apple slices decoratively over the lettuce.
3. For dressing, in a small bowl, stir together vanilla nonfat yogurt, honey, and ground cardamom until blended.
4. Drizzle the mixture evenly over the salads.
5. Sprinkle toasted coconut over the salads for garnish.
Makes 4 side dish salads.
Calories: 167 Fat: 1.11 G Dietary Fiber: 5.19 G Sodium: 21 Mg Calcium: 122 Mg Potassium: 490 Mg Magnesium: 34 M Iron: 1.29 Mg Percent calories from fat: 6%
